'''Otoh Urs''' was a [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] [[City/Legends|city]] on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] some 3000 years before the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]].

==History==
Otoh Urs was a [[City/Legends|city]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]<ref name="SW:GB" /> in [[3000 BBY]] during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[War of the Gungan tribes]].<ref name="EA" /> During [[Boss/Legends|Boss]] [[Gallo/Legends|Gallo's]] efforts to unite the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] villages and defeat Boss [[Rogoe/Legends|Rogoe]], Otoh Urs was led by Boss [[Copek (Gungan)|Copek]] and the town included a [[Command center]]. The Gungans in Otoh Urs had to face [[Bursa/Legends|Bursa]] raids and when Boss [[Gallo/Legends|Gallo]] and [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Marsune (Gungan)|Marsune]] came asking for soldiers to fight Rogoe, they could not spare them because they were needed for the defense against Bursas. Gallo, Marsune, and their militiagungs solved the problem by destroying the Bursa clan that was raiding their town. After the battle, Boss Copek agreed to go to war against Rogoe.

==Behind the scenes==
Otoh Jahai appears in the Gungan campaign in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' and its [[2002]] expansion pack [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']].
